title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Google DeepMind developed Co-Scientist, a multi-agent AI system built on Gemini that iteratively generates, debates, and refines novel scientific hypotheses. The system aims to accelerate scientific discovery by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses for complex problems.
